mapper.select: /** UsptEvlTargetDao.select */ select evl_trget_id , apply_id , sect_id , evl_step_id , presnatn_process_div_cd , presentn_dt , slctn , slctn_dt , attachment_group_id , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_evl_trget where evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId}

/** UsptEvlTargetDao.select */ select evl_trget_id , apply_id , sect_id , evl_step_id , presnatn_process_div_cd , presentn_dt , slctn , slctn_dt , attachment_group_id , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_evl_trget where apply_id = #{applyId} and sect_id = #{sectId} and evl_step_id = #{evlStepId}

/** UsptEvlTargetDao.select */ select a.evl_trget_id , a.apply_id , a.sect_id , a.evl_step_id , a.presnatn_process_div_cd , a.presentn_dt , a.slctn , a.slctn_dt from uspt_evl_trget a inner join uspt_evl_cmit b on a.sect_id = b.sect_id and a.evl_step_id = b.evl_step_id where b.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmit_id}

/*UsptEvlTrgetDao.selectFrontPresnatnTargetListCount*/ select count(a.evl_trget_id) as cnt from uspt_evl_trget a /*평가대상 - 발표자료 대상*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt b /*공고신청자*/ on b.apply_id = a.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc c /*공고*/ on c.pblanc_id = b.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns d /*사업*/ on d.bsns_cd = c.bsns_cd inner join uspt_evl_cmit uec /*평가위원회*/ on a.sect_id = uec.sect_id and a.evl_step_id = uec.evl_step_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = b.member_id left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task e on e.apply_id = b.apply_id where 1 = 1
and b.member_id = #{memberId} --회원ID
and ( to_char(a.presentn_dt,'yyyymmdd') between #{presnatnBgnde} and #{presnatnEndde} or a.presentn_dt is null )/*제출시작일 제출종료일*/
and a.presnatn_process_div_cd = #{presnatnProcessDivCd} /*발표자료처리구분코드(G:PRESNATN_PROCESS_DIV)*/
and c.pblanc_nm like '%' || #{pblancNm} || '%' --공고명
and e.task_nm_ko like '%' || #{taskNmKo} || '%' --과제명

/*UsptEvlTrgetDao.selectFrontPresnatnTargetList*/ select a.evl_trget_id /*평가대상ID*/ , c.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , to_char(to_date(uec.evl_prarnde,'yyyymmdd'),'yyyy-mm-dd')||' '||uec.begin_hour||':00' as evl_prarndt /*평가예정일시*/ , case when a.presentn_dt is null then '-' else to_char(a.presentn_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') end as fmt_presentn_dt /*제출일*/ , a.presnatn_process_div_cd -- 발표자료 처리코드 , coalesce(public.fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PRESNATN_PROCESS_DIV',a.presnatn_process_div_cd), '미진행') as presnatn_process_div_nm /*발표자료 처리구분명*/ , row_number() over (order by a.created_dt desc) as rn , a.attachment_group_id /*첨부파일그룹ID*/ from uspt_evl_trget a /*평가대상 - 발표자료 대상*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt b /*공고신청자*/ on b.apply_id = a.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc c /*공고*/ on c.pblanc_id = b.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns d /*사업*/ on d.bsns_cd = c.bsns_cd inner join uspt_evl_cmit uec /*평가위원회*/ on a.sect_id = uec.sect_id and a.evl_step_id = uec.evl_step_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = b.member_id left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task e on e.apply_id = b.apply_id where 1 = 1
and b.member_id = #{memberId} --회원ID
and ( to_char(a.presentn_dt,'yyyymmdd') between #{presnatnBgnde} and #{presnatnEndde} or a.presentn_dt is null )/*제출시작일 제출종료일*/
and a.presnatn_process_div_cd = #{presnatnProcessDivCd} /*발표자료처리구분코드(G:PRESNATN_PROCESS_DIV)*/
and c.pblanc_nm like '%' || #{pblancNm} || '%' --공고명
and e.task_nm_ko like '%' || #{taskNmKo} || '%' --과제명
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/*UsptEvlTrgetDao.selectFrontPresnatnTargetDetailList*/ select a.evl_trget_id /*평가대상ID*/ , c.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , e.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , to_char(to_date(uec.evl_prarnde,'yyyymmdd'),'yyyy-mm-dd')||' '||uec.begin_hour||':00' as evl_prarndt /*평가예정일시*/ ,to_char(a.presentn_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as fmt_presentn_dt /*제출일*/ , a.presnatn_process_div_cd -- 발표자료 처리코드 , coalesce(public.fn_cmm_get_code_nm('PRESNATN_PROCESS_DIV',a.presnatn_process_div_cd), '미진행') as presnatn_process_div_nm /*발표자료 처리구분명*/ , a.attachment_group_id /*첨부파일그룹ID*/ from uspt_evl_trget a /*평가대상 - 발표자료 대상*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt b /*공고신청자*/ on b.apply_id = a.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc c /*공고*/ on c.pblanc_id = b.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns d /*사업*/ on d.bsns_cd = c.bsns_cd inner join uspt_evl_cmit uec /*평가위원회*/ on a.sect_id = uec.sect_id and a.evl_step_id = uec.evl_step_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = b.member_id left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task e on e.apply_id = b.apply_id where 1 = 1
and a.evl_trget_id= #{evlTrgetId} /*평가대상ID*/

/*UsptEvlTrgetDao.selectPresnatnTargetFileList*/ select ca.attachment_id from uspt_evl_trget a /*평가대상 - 발표자료 대상*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt b /*공고신청자*/ on b.apply_id = a.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc c /*공고*/ on c.pblanc_id = b.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns d /*사업*/ on d.bsns_cd = c.bsns_cd inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = b.member_id left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task e on e.apply_id = b.apply_id inner join cmmt_attachment ca /*첨부파일*/ on a.attachment_group_id = ca.attachment_group_id where 1 = 1
and d.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} --사업년도
and a.presnatn_process_div_cd = #{presnatnProcessDivCd} --처리상태(제출)
and c.pblanc_nm like '%' || #{pblancNm} || '%' --공고명
and b.receipt_no = #{receiptNo} --접수번호
and cm.member_nm like '%' || #{memberNm} || '%' -- 회원명

/** UsptEvlTrgetDao.selectFrontEvlResultList */ select sub.* , row_number() over (order by sub.receipt_no desc) as rn from ( select ubp.pblanc_nm , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko , '최종선정' as evl_step_nm , ulst.last_slctn_trget_id as evl_trget_id , case when ulst.slctn = true then 'Y' else 'N' end as slctn_at , ulst.updated_dt as slctn_dt , ulsor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id as slctn_objc_reqst_id , case when ulsor.last_slctn_objc_reqst_id is null then 'N' else 'Y' end as objc_reqst_at
, ubpat.task_nm_ko , case when ulst.slctn = true then coalesce((to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')::date - to_char(uels.slctn_dspth_dt, 'yyyymmdd')::date), 0) else coalesce((to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')::date - to_char(uels.ptrmsn_dspth_dt, 'yyyymmdd')::date), 0) end as dspth_elapse_de
from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and uep.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and ulst.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id left outer join uspt_last_slctn_objc_reqst ulsor on ulsor.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId}
and ulst.updated_dt >= to_date(#{slctnBgnde}, 'yyyymmdd')
and ulst.updated_dt <= to_date(#{slctnEndde}, 'yyyymmdd')
and ulst.slctn = true and ulst.slctn = false
and ubp.pblanc_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ubpat.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
union all select ubp.pblanc_nm , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko , ues.evl_step_nm , uet.evl_trget_id , case when uet.slctn = true then 'Y' else 'N' end as slctn_at , uet.slctn_dt , uesor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id as slctn_objc_reqst_id , case when uesor.evl_slctn_objc_reqst_id is null then 'N' else 'Y' end as objc_reqst_at
, ubpat.task_nm_ko , case when uet.slctn = true then coalesce((to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')::date - to_char(uec.slctn_dspth_dt, 'yyyymmdd')::date),0) else coalesce((to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')::date - to_char(uec.ptrmsn_dspth_dt, 'yyyymmdd')::date),0) end as dspth_elapse_de
from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and uep.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and uep.evl_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STTUS_03_CODE}' inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id and ues.evl_step_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@EVL_STEP_03_CODE}' inner join uspt_sect us on us.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id and uet.sect_id = us.sect_id and uet.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id left outer join uspt_evl_slctn_objc_reqst uesor on uesor.evl_trget_id = uet.evl_trget_id
inner join uspt_evl_cmit uec on uec.sect_id = us.sect_id and uec.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id
where ubpa.member_id = #{memberId}
and uet.slctn_dt >= to_date(#{slctnBgnde}, 'yyyymmdd')
and uet.slctn_dt <= to_date(#{slctnEndde}, 'yyyymmdd')
and uet.slctn = true and uet.slctn = false
and ubp.pblanc_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ubpat.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
) sub
sub.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId}
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptEvlTrgetDao.selectFrontEvlOpinionList */ select ue.expert_nm , uemr.evl_opinion from uspt_evl_trget uet inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_step_id = uet.evl_step_id inner join uspt_sect us on us.sect_id = uet.sect_id inner join uspt_evl_cmit uec on uec.sect_id = us.sect_id and uec.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm uem on uem.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id inner join uspt_expert ue on ue.expert_id = uem.expert_id left outer join uspt_evl_mfcmm_result uemr on uemr.evl_mfcmm_id = uem.evl_mfcmm_id and uemr.evl_trget_id = uet.evl_trget_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = uet.apply_id and ubpa.member_id = #{memberId} where uet.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId}
